_description: Balanced default. Kills standard MCP/shim orphan chains older than 30 seconds. Spares LSPs, plugin runtimes (which often hold state), and anything the classifier can't identify (unknown). This is the config install-reap.ps1 copies on first install.
_when_to_use: Most users, most of the time. After running for a few days, you can graduate to aggressive.
_extension_hint: Add patterns to spare_cmdline_patterns to protect specific in-house tools, e.g. ['my-stateful-tool', 'company-internal-mcp']. Each pattern is a regex matched case-insensitively against the full command line.
